title: Fire And Water
description: A minecraft mod which adds fire and water tools, ingots, heaven and fire dimensions, biomes, guns etc. to the game
body: Hi there! This mod is Look Fire and Water, this mod can adds new tools, for a example: Fire Multitool, this can affect your Server, SinglePlayer, LAN, Realms etc. With this mod you got a new dimensions too! Fire Dimension and Heaven Dimension, in Fire Dimenion you got Fire Biome which is the **ONLY** place that **USABLE/REAL** fire ores can be found, to go to the dimensions you need to collect atleast 90 raw (which can spawn in overworld) fire ingots for fire dimension and 90 water ingots for heaven dimension, then make ingots block in crafting table (the recipes at gallery) then make nether portal shape with using raw fire block for Fire Dimension water blocks for Heaven Dimension, you dont need to place blocks at the corners. theres too much thing which not will fit in there. **_Download it and play now!_**
